loginPage.loginToContinue: Log in to continue to SaaS Insights.

redditFinder.redditTitle: Discover the real problems of your future clients
redditFinder.redditDesc: Analyze relevant subreddits to identify recurring pain points and validate your product ideas.
redditFinder.keywordsPlaceholder: Ex: how do I get more clients, I hate when...
redditFinder.pressEnter: Press Enter to add an item.
redditFinder.errorSubreddit: Please add at least one subreddit.
redditFinder.errorKeyword: Please add at least one pain keyword.

reviewsFinder.reviewsDesc: Retrieve and analyze customer reviews by rating to identify market strengths and weaknesses.
reviewsFinder.selectStarsDesc: Select one or more ratings to filter the reviews to retrieve.
reviewsFinder.errorCompany: Please add at least one company or website.
reviewsFinder.errorStar: Please select at least one rating (star) to retrieve.
